pageContext.name: War Machine
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Sentinel present the War Machine Action Figure!  War Machine comes as the eighth item of the 'Fighting Armor' series. In this innovative series, the human body will be covered in a suit while each joint point is carefully designed in pursuit of articulation as close as possible to that of a true human body.  Die-cast is used in various parts to reproduce a sense of heaviness. In addition to the massive heavy armor on the legs, the arm and the back are equipped with a machine gun and missile launcher respectively. An adjustable display stand is also included for aerial poses.   Don't miss your chance to add this Fighting Armor War Machine to your Marvel collection!
